response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and demonstrated fluency in AI-adjacent tooling like MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or the 15-year depth in infrastructure/systems engineering required for a director-level IC role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial track record with open-source AI/ML-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and dev-ops
concerns: No clear evidence of 15 years in software/hardware/infrastructure engineering (timeline appears compressed)
Lacks documented AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy leadership experience
No advanced degree in AI or related field; education background is BS only

key_factors.factor: No advanced AI degree or cloud AI platform ownership
